sections.value: Mein Name ist Christian und ich bin ein PhD-Student an der Universität des Saarlandes.

I dedicated my research to advancing machine translation (MT) in low-resource scenarios, which leads me to investigate all kinds of low-resource natural language processing (NLP) besides machine translation.
Use the language selector at the top to switch locales and feel free to explore my work via the navigation bar on the left.
NOTE: This entire homepage is currently under massive (re-)construction, which is why you might find a few placeholders...
